text.title: llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.fix: Replace with per-criterion {pass|fail|partial} or 1-3 with evidence quotes.
antipattern.detector: Score variance per build; should not be all 7.

antipattern.symptom: Same SUT gets different scores on re-run
antipattern.fix: temperature=0 and seed if supported; cache by (judge_model, prompt_hash, sut_output_hash).
antipattern.detector: Re-run same input; score must match.

antipattern.symptom: Position bias: option A wins 65% of time
antipattern.fix: Swap order on half the runs; aggregate.
antipattern.detector: A/B swap test; near 50/50 if no bias.

antipattern.root-cause: No length penalty; LLM rewards verbosity.
antipattern.fix: Cap evidence length; explicitly instruct 'do not reward length'.
antipattern.detector: Inject a verbose-but-wrong sample; verify it loses.
